title: InboundEnvelope
description: Cross-language envelope appended to the Upstash Redis Stream `inbound-stream`. Produced by ingest channels (Vercel WhatsApp webhook today; future LinkedIn/manual relays). Consumed by the Python `workers.stream_consumer` which calls `connecting_dots.dispatcher.dispatch_url`.

message_id.description: Idempotency key. For WhatsApp this is `messages[].id` from Meta. For non-WA sources, a synthetic id like `mailto:<imap-uid>` or `linkedin:<urn>`.

url.description: The captured URL to dispatch. Channel-specific extraction has already happened upstream.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the ingest channel received the message.

raw_payload.description: Channel-specific provenance blob (e.g. the Meta `messages[i]` object). Opaque to the consumer; forwarded verbatim to `dispatch_url`.
